mapper.select: /* SQL ID : CrecrsDAO.select 설 명 : 강의실 정보 */

/* SQL ID : CrecrsDAO.list 설 명 : 강의실 목록 */ SELECT A.*, (SELECT * FROM (SELECT CRS_SMSTR_ID FROM TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN WHERE SBJCT_ID = SBJCT_ID) A WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS CRS_SMSTR_ID FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : CrecrsDAO.listPaging 설 명 : 강의실 목록 페이징 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER() AS LINE_NO , A.* FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.selectCreCrs 설 명 : 개설과목 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.CRS_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.SBJCT_ENNM , A.SBJCT_ID , A.CRS_ID , ( CASE WHEN A.CRS_ID = '10' THEN '1학기' WHEN A.CRS_ID = '11' THEN '여름학기' WHEN A.CRS_ID = '20' THEN '2학기' WHEN A.CRS_ID = '21' THEN '겨울학기' ELSE '-' END ) AS CRE_TERM_NM , A.DVCLAS_NO , A.SBJCT_EXPLN , A.SBJCT_OP_TYCD , A.DEPT_ID , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_HOME_USER_DEPT_ID WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND DEPT_ID = A.DEPT_ID AND USEYN = 'Y') AS DEPTNM , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_HOME_USER_DEPT_ID WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND DEPT_ID = A.MNGT_DEPT_ID AND USEYN = 'Y') AS MNGT_DEPT_NM , A.CRDTS , A.UNIV_CD , A.UNIV_GBNCD , A.CMCRS_GBNCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND CTGRCD = 'CMCRS_GBNCD' AND CD = A.CMCRS_GBNCD) AS COMP_DV_NM , A.LCTR_TYCD , A.LRN_CNTRL , A.MID_ATNDC_CHK_USEYN , A.DPLM_OTPTYN , A.DPLM_SCRYN , A.FNSH_PROC_TYCD , A.FNSH_SCR , A.FNSH_SCR_DELRT , A.ATNDC_DELRT , A.ASMT_DELRT , A.DSCS_DELRT , A.EXAM_DELRT , A.TEAM_ACTV_DELRT , A.ETC_DELRT , A.ATNDLC_APLY_MTHD_CD , A.QUOTA_LMTYN , A.ATNDLC_QUOTA , A.ATNDLC_CERT_STSCD , A.ATNDLC_APLY_SDTTM , A.ATNDLC_APLY_EDTTM , A.ATNDLC_SDTTM , A.ATNDLC_EDTTM , A.AUDIT_EDTTM , A.MRK_PROC_SDTTM , A.MRK_PROC_EDTTM , A.MRK_OYN , A.MRK_OPEN_SDTTM , A.MRK_INQ_SRVYYN , A.MRK_INQ_SRVY_ID , A.USEYN , A.AIS_DATA_LNKGYN , A.KYWD , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , B.CRS_SMSTR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND RPRSYN = 'Y' AND SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID)) AS tchNm , (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND RPRSYN = 'Y' AND SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID) AS tchNo , (SELECT COUNT(STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND AUDITYN = 'N') AS stdCnt FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}

/* SQL ID : CrecrsDAO.selectCrsCre 설 명 : 개설 과목 한개 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID AS CRS_CRE_CD , A.CRS_ID , C.CRS_CTGRCD
, A.SBJCT_TYCD
, A.SBJCT_ID , A.CRS_ID , ( CASE WHEN A.CRS_ID = '10' THEN '1학기' WHEN A.CRS_ID = '11' THEN '여름학기' WHEN A.CRS_ID = '20' THEN '2학기' WHEN A.CRS_ID = '21' THEN '겨울학기' ELSE '-' END ) AS CRE_TERM_NM , A.SBJCT_EXPLN , A.SBJCT_OP_TYCD
, A.DVCLAS_NO , A.DEPT_ID
, A.SBJCTNM , A.SBJCT_ENNM , A.ATNDLC_APLY_SDTTM , A.ATNDLC_APLY_EDTTM , A.ATNDLC_SDTTM , A.ATNDLC_EDTTM , A.AUDIT_EDTTM , A.ATNDLC_CERT_STSCD
, A.ATNDLC_QUOTA
, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_PROF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID) AS TCH_TOTAL_CNT
, A.FNSH_SCR , A.CRDTS
, A.CMCRS_GBNCD
, A.MRK_PROC_SDTTM , A.MRK_PROC_EDTTM
, A.LCTR_TYCD
, A.LRN_CNTRL
, A.USEYN , A.KYWD , A.RGTR_ID , A.REG_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM
, B.MRK_EVL_TYCD
, C.CRSNM
, A.FNSH_PROC_TYCD , C.DPLM_ISSUYN , (CASE WHEN D.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '-' ELSE (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER_PRFIL WHERE USER_PRFIL_ID = D.USER_ID) END) AS USERNM
FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_MRK_EVLRT B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_CRS C ON A.CRS_ID = C.CRS_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_PROF D ON A.SBJCT_ID = D.SBJCT_ID AND D.RPRSYN = 'Y'

/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.listCreCrsDeclsNo 설 명 : 학기의 과정의 개설과목 분반 리스트 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.DVCLAS_NO , B.CRS_SMSTR_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.CRS_ID = #{crsCd} ORDER BY A.DVCLAS_NO

/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.listCrsCreByTerm 설 명 : 학기별 개설과목 목록 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.ATNDLC_CERT_STSCD != 'CLOSE' ORDER BY A.SBJCTNM

/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.selectTchCreCrs 설 명 : 특정 과목 대표교수 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.CRS_ID , B.USER_ID , C.USERNM , C.TKN_EML , A.SBJCT_ID , A.CRS_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN SBJCT_PROF B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID JOIN USR C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND B.PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND B.RPRSYN = 'Y'

/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.selectCrecrsTch 설 명 : 과목 > 조교/교수 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.USER_ID , A.PROF_TYCD , A.RPRSYN , A.AIS_DATA_LNKGYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , (CASE WHEN A.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '-' ELSE (SELECT USERNM FROM USR WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) END) AS USERNM , (SELECT EMAIL FROM USR WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS EMAIL , (SELECT MOBILE_NO FROM USR WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS MOBILE_NO , (SELECT PHT_FILE FROM USR WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS PHT_FILE_BYTE FROM SBJCT_PROF A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.PROF_TYCD != 'MONITORING'
mapper.update:
/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.updateEvalInfo 설 명 : 과목 정보 등록의 평가방법, 강의설정 탭 값 등록 */
MERGE INTO TB_LMS_CRE_CRS_EVAL T USING ( SELECT #{crsCreCd} AS SBJCT_ID, #{scoreEvalType} AS MRK_EVL_TYCD, #{scoreGradeType} AS MRK_GRD_TYCD, #{passScore} AS PASS_SCORE, #{fixedA} AS FIXED_A, #{fixedB} AS FIXED_B, #{fixedC} AS FIXED_C, #{fixedD} AS FIXED_D, #{fixedF} AS FIXED_F, #{ratioA1} AS RATIO_A1, #{ratioA2} AS RATIO_A2, #{ratioB} AS RATIO_B FROM DUAL ) S ON (T.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.MRK_EVL_TYCD = S.MRK_EVL_TYCD , T.MRK_GRD_TYCD = S.MRK_GRD_TYCD , T.PASS_SCORE = S.PASS_SCORE , T.FIXED_A = S.FIXED_A , T.FIXED_B = S.FIXED_B , T.FIXED_C = S.FIXED_C , T.FIXED_D = S.FIXED_D , T.FIXED_F = S.FIXED_F , T.RATIO_A1 = S.RATIO_A1 , T.RATIO_A2 = S.RATIO_A2 , T.RATIO_B = S.RATIO_B WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SBJCT_ID , MRK_EVL_TYCD , MRK_GRD_TYCD , PASS_SCORE , FIXED_A , FIXED_B , FIXED_C , FIXED_D , FIXED_F , RATIO_A1 , RATIO_A2 , RATIO_B ) VALUES ( S.SBJCT_ID , S.MRK_EVL_TYCD , S.MRK_GRD_TYCD , S.PASS_SCORE , S.FIXED_A , S.FIXED_B , S.FIXED_C , S.FIXED_D , S.FIXED_F , S.RATIO_A1 , S.RATIO_A2 , S.RATIO_B )
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.listCreCrsDeclsNoByTch 설 명 : 특정 과목과 동일 대표교수 분반 리스트 */
WITH SBJCT AS ( SELECT PROF_ID , CRS_MSTR_ID , SMSTR_CHRT_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_OFRNG WHERE SBJCT_OFRNG_ID = #{sbjctOfrngId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' ) SELECT SBJCT_OFRNG.SBJCT_OFRNG_ID , SBJCT_OFRNG.SBJCTNM , SBJCT_OFRNG.DVCLAS_NO , SBJCT_OFRNG.CRS_MSTR_ID , SBJCT_OFRNG.SMSTR_CHRT_ID , SBJCT_ADM.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_OFRNG SBJCT_OFRNG LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_CRS_MSTR CRS_MSTR ON SBJCT_OFRNG.CRS_MSTR_ID = CRS_MSTR.CRS_MSTR_ID AND SBJCT_OFRNG.SBJCT_REF_TYCD = 'CRS' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SMSTR_CHRT ON SBJCT_OFRNG.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = SMSTR_CHRT.SMSTR_CHRT_ID AND SBJCT_OFRNG.SBJCT_REF_TYCD = 'CHRT' JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM SBJCT_ADM ON SBJCT_OFRNG.SBJCT_OFRNG_ID = SBJCT_ADM.SBJCT_OFRNG_ID AND SBJCT_ADM.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'PROF' AND SBJCT_ADM.USER_ID = (SELECT PROF_ID FROM SBJCT) WHERE SBJCT_OFRNG.DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT_OFRNG.USEYN = 'Y' AND (SBJCT_OFRNG.CRS_MSTR_ID = (SELECT CRS_MSTR_ID FROM SBJCT) OR SBJCT_OFRNG.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = (SELECT SMSTR_CHRT_ID FROM SBJCT)) ORDER BY SBJCT_OFRNG.DVCLAS_NO

/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.selectTch 설 명 : 개설과목관리 > 등록된 운영자 리스트 */ SELECT IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(A.USER_ID),'') AS USER_ID , IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(A.PROF_TYCD),'') AS PROF_TYCD FROM SBJCT_PROF A, TB_LMS_SBJCT B WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}

/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.listCrecrsTchEgov 설 명 : 과목 > 조교/교수 목록 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID AS crsCreCd , A.USER_ID AS userId , A.PROF_TYCD AS tchType , A.RPRSYN AS repYn , A.AIS_DATA_LNKGYN AS haksaYn , B.USERNM AS userNm , B.TC_ID AS tcId , B.TKN_EML AS tcEmail , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm FROM SBJCT_PROF A LEFT JOIN USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.PROF_TYCD != 'MONITORING' ORDER BY A.PROF_TYCD DESC

/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.listCurrentTermCrecrsByTch 설 명 : 교수자의 현재학기 과목 목록 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.DVCLAS_NO FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.CRS_SMSTR_ID IN ( SELECT CRS_SMSTR_ID FROM CRS_SMSTR WHERE NOW_SMSTRYN = 'Y' AND ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd} ) WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.ATNDLC_CERT_STSCD != 'CLOSE' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND USER_ID = #{userId} )
AND A.UNIV_CD = #{uniCd}

/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.countCreUser 설 명 : 개설 과목 > 수강생 추가 목록 count */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY A.USERNM ASC ORDER BY A.USERNM DESC ORDER BY A.MOBILE_NO ASC ORDER BY A.MOBILE_NO DESC ORDER BY A.EMAIL ASC ORDER BY A.EMAIL DESC ) AS LINE_NO , A.USER_ID , A.USERNM , (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS USER_ID , A.USER_ENNM , IFNULL(A.PRFIL_PHOTO_FILE_ID,0) AS PRFIL_PHOTO_FILE_ID , A.DUP_INFO , A.MOBILE_NO , A.EMAIL , A.ORG_ID , (SELECT ORGNM FROM TB_LMS_ORG WHERE ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID) AS ORGNM , A.DEPT_ID , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM USR WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS DEPTNM , A.EMAIL_RECV , A.SMS_RECV , A.DISABLILITY_YN , A.USER_GRADE FROM USR A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.USER_ID NOT IN (SELECT C.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT C WHERE C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND C.ATNDLC_STSCD IN ('E','S','N') )
AND A.ORG_ID IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID )
AND ( LOWER((SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID)) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(A.USERNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
ORDER BY A.USERNM ASC ORDER BY A.USERNM DESC ORDER BY A.MOBILE_NO ASC ORDER BY A.MOBILE_NO DESC ORDER BY A.EMAIL ASC ORDER BY A.EMAIL DESC ) T

/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.creUserlistPageing 설 명 : 개설 과목 > 수강생 추가 목록 */
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
ORDER BY A.USERNM ASC ORDER BY A.USERNM DESC ORDER BY A.MOBILE_NO ASC ORDER BY A.MOBILE_NO DESC ORDER BY A.EMAIL ASC ORDER BY A.EMAIL DESC ORDER BY A.USERNM ASC
) AS LINE_NO , A.USER_ID , A.USERNM , (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS USER_ID , A.USER_ENNM , IFNULL(A.PRFIL_PHOTO_FILE_ID,0) AS PRFIL_PHOTO_FILE_ID , A.DUP_INFO , A.MOBILE_NO , A.EMAIL , A.ORG_ID , (SELECT ORGNM FROM TB_LMS_ORG WHERE ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID) AS ORGNM , A.DEPT_ID , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM USR WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS DEPTNM , A.EMAIL_RECV , A.SMS_RECV , A.DISABLILITY_YN , A.USER_GRADE FROM USR A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.USER_ID NOT IN (SELECT C.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT C WHERE C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND C.ATNDLC_STSCD IN ('E','S','N'))
AND A.ORG_ID IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID )
AND ( LOWER((SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID)) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(A.USERNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
ORDER BY A.USERNM ASC ORDER BY A.USERNM DESC ORDER BY A.MOBILE_NO ASC ORDER BY A.MOBILE_NO DESC ORDER BY A.EMAIL ASC ORDER BY A.EMAIL DESC ORDER BY A.USERNM ASC
mapper.sql: SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.CRS_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.SBJCT_EXPLN , A.SBJCT_YR , A.SBJCT_SMSTR , A.SBJCT_OP_TYCD , A.DVCLAS_NO , A.DEPT_ID , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE CD = A.DEPT_ID) AS DEPTNM , (SELECT CD_SEQ FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE CD = A.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_ID_ODR , A.SBJCT_ENNM , A.CRDTS , A.CMCRS_GBNCD , A.USEYN , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID) AS STD_TOTAL_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_PROF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID) AS TCH_TOTAL_CNT , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER_PRFIL WHERE USER_PRFIL_ID = C.USER_ID) AS USERNM , C.USER_ID , A.REG_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_CRS B ON A.CRS_ID = B.CRS_ID AND B.ORG_ID = #{orgId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_PROF C ON A.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND C.RPRSYN = 'Y'
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.countManageCourse 설 명 : 개설과목 관리 목록 수 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM (
) T

/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.listManageCourse 설 명 : 개설과목 관리 목록 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.DEPT_ID_ODR, A.DEPTNM, A.CRS_ID, A.DVCLAS_NO) AS LINE_NO , A.* FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : CreCrsDAO.infoCreCrs 설 명 : 개설과목 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.CRS_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.SBJCT_ENNM , A.DVCLAS_NO FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}

/* SQL ID : CrecrsDAO.listHpIntch 설 명 : 학점교류 수강생 조회 */ SELECT SBJCT_ID , DVCLAS_NO , SBJCTNM , URLNM , URL FROM TB_LMS_USER_CRDTS_EXCH WHERE 1=1 AND YR = #{yr} AND SMSTR_TYCD = #{tmGbn} AND CRDTS_EXCH_UNVSTD_ID = #{crdtsExchUnvstdId} AND ATNDLC_APLYYN = 'Y'

/* SQL ID : CrecrsDAO.selectPrevCourseItem 설 명 : 이전과목 가져오기 항목 목록 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID
, LESSON.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID
, NOTICE.BBS_ID AS NOTICE_BBS_ID , NOTICE.ATCL_ID AS NOTICE_ATCL_ID , NOTICE.LINE_NO AS NOTICE_LINE_NO
, PDS.BBS_ID AS PDS_BBS_ID , PDS.ATCL_ID AS PDS_ATCL_ID , PDS.LINE_NO AS PDS_LINE_NO
, ASMNT.ASMT_ID AS ASMT_ID , ASMNT.LINE_NO AS ASMNT_LINE_NO
, FORUM.DSCS_ID AS DSCS_ID , FORUM.LINE_NO AS FORUM_LINE_NO
, QUIZ.EXAM_ID AS QUIZ_CD , QUIZ.LINE_NO AS QUIZ_LINE_NO
, RESCH.SRVY_ID AS SRVY_ID , RESCH.LINE_NO AS RESCH_LINE_NO
FROM ( SELECT A.SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) A
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , C.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM B ON A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS C ON B.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = C.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AND C.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD != 'VIDEO_LINK' AND C.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) LESSON ON A.SBJCT_ID = LESSON.SBJCT_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY C.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , A.BBS_ID , B.RLTN_REF_CD AS SBJCT_ID , C.ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS A JOIN TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN B ON A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.RLTN_REF_CD = #{crsCreCd} AND B.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE' JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL C ON A.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.BBS_ID = 'NOTICE' ) NOTICE ON A.SBJCT_ID = NOTICE.SBJCT_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY C.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , A.BBS_ID , B.RLTN_REF_CD AS SBJCT_ID , C.ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS A JOIN TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN B ON A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.RLTN_REF_CD = #{crsCreCd} AND B.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE' JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL C ON A.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.BBS_ID = 'PDS' ) PDS ON A.SBJCT_ID = PDS.SBJCT_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , A.ASMT_ID , A.SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ASMT_CTGRCD NOT IN ('EXAM', 'SUBS', 'INDIVIDUAL') ) ASMNT ON A.SBJCT_ID = ASMNT.SBJCT_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , A.DSCS_ID , A.SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.DSCS_TYCD NOT IN ('EXAM', 'SUBS') ) FORUM ON A.SBJCT_ID = FORUM.SBJCT_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , A.EXAM_ID , B.SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND B.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' AND A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') ) QUIZ ON A.SBJCT_ID = QUIZ.SBJCT_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , A.SRVY_ID , B.SBJCT_ID AS SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY A JOIN TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SRVY_ID = B.SRVY_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SRVY_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' ) RESCH ON A.SBJCT_ID = RESCH.SBJCT_ID

/* SQL ID : CrecrsDAO.listProfUnivGbn 설 명 : 운영중인 대학구분 목록 조회 */ SELECT B.USER_ID , A.UNIV_GBNCD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN SBJCT_PROF B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.PROF_TYCD != 'MONITORING' AND B.USER_ID = #{userId} JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN C ON A.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID JOIN CRS_SMSTR D ON C.CRS_SMSTR_ID = D.CRS_SMSTR_ID AND D.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{creYear} AND A.CRS_ID = #{creTerm} AND A.SBJCT_TYCD = 'UNI' AND A.UNIV_GBNCD IS NOT NULL GROUP BY B.USER_ID, A.UNIV_GBNCD

/* SQL ID : CrecrsDAO.listStdUnivGbn 설 명 : 수강중인 대학구분 목록 조회 */ SELECT B.USER_ID , A.UNIV_GBNCD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND B.USER_ID = #{userId} AND B.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{creYear} AND A.CRS_ID = #{creTerm} AND A.SBJCT_TYCD = 'UNI' AND A.UNIV_GBNCD IS NOT NULL GROUP BY B.USER_ID, A.UNIV_GBNCD

/* SQL ID : CrecrsDAO.countStdUserId 설 명 : 수강중인 학번 수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT B.USER_ID) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND B.AUDITYN = 'N' AND B.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID IN
#{item}
